steps.title: Notice the added tension
steps.content: The first idea is that Hayes's poem suggests fluid interplay between poetry and visual art. The next idea complicates that by saying the poem also highlights tensions between the two modes.

steps.title: Signal simultaneous contrast
steps.content: A would restate the same idea, B would present a result, and D would introduce a specific detail. The sentence needs a transition that allows both interplay and tension to be true at once. The answer is C.
